subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit the chosen ones of the True One, glorified be His majesty, who, detached from the world, have arisen to serve His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا اولیاء حق جل جلاله را لایق و سزاست که منقطعا عن العالم بر خدمت امر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
